title: Exact Release 1218 base and house-state boundary
description: Define the exact base, production delta, and exclusions for the evolving-house substrate.
close_reason: Release 1219 stages exact qualified Release 1218 artifact efc8bd9f264f60bb56f2daf3e4d7d6d32a272997434802ee76455781a8edf521 and fails closed unless exactly 1actions.zil, 1dungeon.zil, assistance.zil, house_state_foundation.zil, and zork1.zil change.

title: Persistent condition and atmosphere schema
description: Represent condition, collection, knowledge, security, and atmosphere as compact state.
close_reason: The production module stores a versioned compact schema for condition, collection, knowledge, security, and atmosphere, derived from real house rooms, the trophy case, rug, trap door, and kitchen window rather than parallel replacement objects.

title: Adventure-to-house event receipts
description: Record meaningful discoveries, damage, deliveries, returns, and consequences deterministically.
close_reason: The foundation records only bounded first-use, Attic, Cellar, return, real trophy-case collection, and physical-disturbance receipts; it does not log ordinary movement, parser turns, or container shuffles.

title: Room-description projection
description: Reflect state in Living Room, Kitchen, Attic, Bedroom, and Cellar descriptions without topology changes.
close_reason: Canonical Living Room, Kitchen, Attic, and Cellar descriptions now append bounded state-aware prose after original room behavior. Release 1218 has no canonical Bedroom, so the train correctly adds no unreachable placeholder or topology change and leaves a reusable projection hook for a future authored room.

title: Canonical score and puzzle isolation
description: Prove no treasure duplication, scoring drift, auto-solves, or chore loops.
close_reason: Qualification opens the real trophy case and deposits the real painting through ordinary parser actions; the existing trophy-case score rises canonically while the house substrate adds no score, treasure copy, automatic route, puzzle completion, or upkeep loop.

title: Save migration and deterministic restore
description: Persist the house schema and define safe defaults for older snapshots.
close_reason: The versioned schema derives conservative defaults from existing touched rooms, trophy-case contents, rug, trap door, and window state; native save/restore returns exact globals and object state after deliberate corruption without a post-restore repair pass.

title: Foundation gameplay and state qualification
description: Prove event receipt, projection, reset boundaries, and native save/restore.
close_reason: The pinned route qualifies house entry, Attic, Cellar, return, trophy-case collection, disturbance, RECAP, migration, deliberate corruption, and ordinary native SAVE/RESTORE against Release 1219 identity: 230,144 bytes, checksum 0xbe6bc80a, SHA-256 e0de2b66453e6539370377691486a133ad32b3d53d2ff3e676d0d90f23be0e0f.

title: House-state foundation capstone
description: Document the substrate and leave stable hooks for room-specific trains.
close_reason: The dedicated Release 1219 README, House of Records program, continuation handoff, fail-closed workflow, bead validator, and incremental roadmap validator are truthful. All 24 workflows passed on capstone-candidate head 3f42726ab0a3db48cc86665d644089f4755328f1; no review submission or inline thread remained, and PR #16 stayed open and unmerged.

title: Displayable-object registry and provenance
description: Define which real objects may be displayed and what must remain puzzle-active.
close_reason: Release 1220 uses a bounded surface registry for real portable objects and authored provenance keyed to canonical object identity. Active ritual and canary objects remain real, removable, and explicitly non-retired.

title: Canonical trophy-case integration
description: Preserve score flow, treasure identity, and removal behavior while exposing richer display state.
close_reason: The canonical trophy case and OTVAL-FROB remain the sole house score authority. New surfaces are score-neutral, the closed case is secure, the open case is exposed, and ordinary placement/removal recalculates canonical score without a museum score.

title: Wall, shelf, stand, and frame surfaces
description: Add bounded display surfaces for paintings, weapons, maps, ritual objects, and curios.
close_reason: Release 1220 adds one fixed gallery frame, weapon wall, record shelf, and relic stand to the canonical Living Room. The surfaces are open, nonportable, parser-addressable, and limited to coherent object families.

title: Place, move, and recover displays
description: Support deliberate mounting and removal without cloning or trapping required objects.
close_reason: The player uses ordinary PUT and TAKE. Qualification mounts the active brass bell before ritual completion, later removes and replaces the real guide under canonical carrying limits, and proves no display clone or trapped required object.

title: Related-object group synthesis
description: Unlock optional historical observations when coherent artifact groups are displayed.
close_reason: Current real arrangements synthesize house, completed ritual, repaired dam, troll-conflict, and intact-or-broken canary histories. Room prose follows current placement while persistent receipts remember previously formed groups for RECAP.

title: Theft, disturbance, and display security
description: Let canonical theft or house disturbance affect unsecured displays with recoverable evidence.
close_reason: When Release 1219 marks the house exposed and the canonical thief remains available, one exact unsecured treasure moves into the real thief. The Living Room retains nonportable physical evidence and recovery proceeds through canonical thief booty handling.

title: Museum save/restore and object-tree proof
description: Restore placement, provenance, case contents, and security without duplication.
close_reason: The permanent Release 1220 route saves after theft, deliberately clears surfaces, globals, thief custody, and case state, then restores exact placements, groups, evidence, score authority, painting custody, and egg/canary nesting without repair or duplication. Locked identity: 237,312 bytes, checksum 0x630d724a, SHA-256 f5bd739e38ea4b355ddfc089b887e32742740444f69179facc51af7de1fb91c4.

title: Living-room museum capstone
description: Publish exact boundaries, routes, evidence, and hooks for later house systems.
close_reason: Release 1220 documentation, House program, handoff, feature matrix, frontier, roadmap validator, Train 2 validator, and PR scope audit are truthful. All 27 capstone-candidate workflows passed on head 5519a8d59b490732de41ff4381bd1bdef9736f34 after retrying one inherited stochastic troll-combat route; PR #17 remained open and unmerged with no review or inline thread.

title: House water and container handling
description: Use real containers and a bounded water source while preserving puzzle water.

title: Cleaning and residue consequences
description: Extend grime, soot, rust, paint, and tool-state interactions through grounded surfaces.

title: Drying, warming, and cooling
description: Provide sensible temperature changes with timer and fire-safety boundaries.

title: Food preparation and creature offerings
description: Prepare existing food for plausible gifts and lures without a hunger meter.

title: Bounded heat, water, and utensil experiments
description: Author selected reactions while rejecting universal chemistry and crafting.

title: Cupboard and work-surface storage
description: Improve container, pronoun, and retrieval behavior without hiding required objects.

title: Kitchen gameplay and persistence qualification
description: Prove object identity, timers, residues, food state, storage, and restore.

title: Kitchen laboratory capstone
description: Document the matrix, exclusions, evidence, and downstream hooks.
